name: Chicken with Lemon Sauce (Cantonese)
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Rice wine; or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: jlapoint@hpl3sn03.cern.ch (Jenipher Lapoint)
1. Cut chicken breasts into very thin 2-inch by 1-1/2-inch slices.
2. Combine marinade ingredients in a medium bowl. Add chicken; mix well. Let stand 15 minutes.
3. Combine ingredients for lemon sauce in a small bowl; mix well and set aside.
4. Mix flour and cornstarch in a medium bowl. Dip chicken in flour mixture to coat.
5. Heat 8 cups oil in a wok over medium-high heat to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
6. Reduce heat to low. Carefully lower flour-coated chicken into hot oil with a slotted metal spoon.
7. Deep fry 30 seconds to a minute, until chicken is light golden. Remove chicken with a slotted spoon, drain well over wok.
8. Arrange on a platter. Remove oil from wok except for 1 tablespoon.
9. Heat remaining oil in wok over medium heat. Stir Lemon Sauce into hot oil. Bring to a boil.
10. When sauce thickens slightly, add 1 tablespoon vegetable oil to make sauce glossy. Stir sauce and pour over chicken.
11. Garnish with lemon slices and serve immediately.
Makes 4 servings.
